allow:
Bash(echo "## Transformation Plan for /Users/gaohn/gaohn/frost/scripts

### Phase 1: Infrastructure Setup
1. Create \`scripts/types.py\` with centralized TypeVar definitions and protocols
2. Update \`pyproject.toml\` with missing dependencies (typer) and move linting configs

### Phase 2: Data Model Transformation  
1. Convert all dataclasses to Pydantic v2 models:
   - \`TermPair\`, \`GlossaryTerm\`, \`GlossaryData\` in create_glossary script
   - \`Task\` in create_tasks script
   - \`TranslationEntry\`, \`TranslationData\` in import_data script
2. Replace dict usage with strongly-typed Pydantic models throughout

### Phase 3: Type Safety Improvements
1. Add missing type hints to all functions
2. Fix existing type annotations (remove Union/Optional, use modern syntax)
3. Implement proper Protocol-based dependency injection

### Phase 4: Code Cleanup
1. Remove ALL comments and docstrings from every file
2. Improve naming for self-documenting code
3. Ensure functions follow single responsibility principle

### Phase 5: Architecture Refactoring
1. Extract database operations into repository classes
2. Create service layer for business logic
3. Implement proper error handling hierarchies
4. Apply SOLID principles throughout

The transformation will result in:
- 100% type coverage (mypy/pyright passing)
- Zero ruff warnings/errors
- Production-ready, maintainable code
- Proper separation of concerns

This plan preserves functionality while elevating code quality to the highest standards.")
